summary: Iteration 76 - All 5 Bug Fixes Verified. Backend API tests: 10/10 passed. Frontend UI tests: All verified via Playwright screenshots.

bug_fix_1_dashboard_nickname.description: Dashboard welcome shows nickname 'NeoMorpheus' in yellow, production_house_name 'Anacapito Studio's' as gray subtitle
bug_fix_1_dashboard_nickname.evidence: Screenshot shows 'BENVENUTO IN CINEWORLD STUDIO'S, NeoMorpheus' with 'Anacapito Studio's' below

bug_fix_2_post_production_films.description: Production Studio Post-Production shows 0 films - correctly queries film_projects with status 'pre_production' instead of released films
bug_fix_2_post_production_films.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Nessun film pronto per il rilascio' in Post-Production panel
bug_fix_2_post_production_films.code_location: server.py line 9887-9888: queries film_projects with status 'pre_production'

bug_fix_3_variable_casting_agents.description: Casting proposals show variable agent counts per role (not all same number)
bug_fix_3_variable_casting_agents.evidence: Screenshot shows Regista: 5 disponibili, Sceneggiatore: 2 agenti in arrivo, Attori: 8 agenti, Compositore: 3 agenti
bug_fix_3_variable_casting_agents.code_location: film_pipeline.py lines 176-192: role_bonus varies per type, agents 1-5, candidates 1-3 each

bug_fix_4_casting_speedup_cost.description: Casting speed-up cost is $5,000 per pending (not $15,000)
bug_fix_4_casting_speedup_cost.evidence: Sceneggiatore (2 pending): $10,000, Attori (8 pending): $40,000, Compositore (3 pending): $15,000 - all = pending * $5,000

bug_fix_5_acting_school_counter.description: Acting School counter shows 'occupati / disponibili' format
bug_fix_5_acting_school_counter.evidence: Header shows 'Livello 1 • 1 occupati / 0 disponibili', Casting section shows '1 occupati / 2 disponibili'
bug_fix_5_acting_school_counter.code_location: ActingSchool.jsx line 174: shows training_count + ' occupati / ' + available_slots + ' disponibili'

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx line 359: Correctly shows user?.nickname with production_house_name as subtitle
server.py line 9887-9888: Post-production now queries film_projects with status 'pre_production' (pipeline films ready for shooting)
film_pipeline.py lines 166-255: generate_cast_proposals uses variable agents (1-5) and candidates per agent (1-3)
film_pipeline.py line 496: Speed-up cost correctly calculated as len(pending) * 5000
ActingSchool.jsx line 174, 192-194: Counter displays 'X occupati / Y disponibili' format
FilmPipeline.jsx lines 408-412: Speed-up button shows dollar cost from backend calculation
seed_data_creation: Test film 'Test Agenti Variabili' was pre-existing from main agent context
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified working: (1) Dashboard shows nickname in welcome, production_house_name as subtitle (2) Production Studio Post-Production shows pipeline films in pre_production status, not released films (3) Casting has variable agents per role (1-5 agents, each bringing 1-3 candidates) (4) Casting speed-up cost is $5,000 per pending proposal (5) Acting School shows 'X occupati / Y disponibili' counter format. User has 2 films in casting phase: 'Test Agenti Variabili' and 'La Vendetta del Drago Rosso'.

verified_bug_fixes.bug_1_dashboard_nickname: FIXED - Welcome shows 'NeoMorpheus' (nickname), subtitle shows 'Anacapito Studio's' (production_house_name)
verified_bug_fixes.bug_2_post_production_query: FIXED - Queries film_projects with status 'pre_production' instead of films 'in_theaters'
verified_bug_fixes.bug_3_variable_casting_agents: FIXED - Each role has different agent counts (1-5 agents per role, 1-3 candidates each)
verified_bug_fixes.bug_4_speedup_cost_5k: FIXED - Cost is $5,000 per pending (2 pending = $10K, 8 pending = $40K)
verified_bug_fixes.bug_5_acting_school_counter: FIXED - Shows 'occupati / disponibili' format in header and casting students section
